02

Work Experience

7.5 Yrs
Total Professional Experience
7.5 years across IT & infrastructure roles with 2+ years specializing in DevOps — cloud-native platforms, CI/CD automation, Kubernetes, and Infrastructure as Code at scale.
WORK
Professional Journey
7.5
DevOps Engineer2023 — Present
Cloud Infrastructure · CI/CD · Kubernetes · IaC
  • Built scalable CI/CD pipelines with blue-green & canary strategies, automated rollbacks, multibranch Jenkins workflows, and GitOps with ArgoCD.
  • Managed EKS & AKS clusters with RBAC, network policies, pod security, and TLS encryption achieving 99%+ uptime SLA across all production environments.
  • Implemented Istio service mesh for mTLS service-to-service communication and canary traffic splitting via VirtualServices and DestinationRules.
  • Provisioned AWS & Azure infrastructure using reusable Terraform modules — VPC, EKS, RDS — with S3 remote state and DynamoDB locking.
  • Reduced cloud costs by 40% through rightsizing, Reserved Instances, Spot usage for batch workloads, and S3 lifecycle policies.
  • Created Kubernetes Operators using Operator SDK and CRDs to automate complex database backup workflows cluster-wide.
  • Developed Helm charts for versioned deployments across Dev, QA, UAT, and Production with approval gates and instant rollback.
Systems & IT Infrastructure Engineer2018 — 2023
Infrastructure · Networking · VMware · Cloud Migration
  • Managed on-premises server infrastructure — hardware provisioning, OS patching, and capacity planning for 200+ servers across data centers.
  • Administered network infrastructure including firewalls, switches, VLANs, VPNs, and DNS/DHCP across multi-site enterprise environments.
  • Built and maintained VMware vSphere virtualization clusters with HA, vMotion, and DRS policies ensuring business continuity.
  • Led migration of 50+ on-premise workloads to AWS — EC2, RDS, S3 — as first cloud adoption project with minimal downtime.
  • Automated routine IT operations using PowerShell and Bash scripts reducing manual effort by 60% across the team.
  • Implemented backup and DR procedures using Veeam — consistently achieving RPO/RTO targets across all critical systems.
Junior IT Support / System Administrator2016 — 2018
IT Support · Windows Server · Active Directory · Helpdesk
  • Provided L1/L2 technical support for 500+ users across hardware, software, and network issues with consistently high satisfaction scores.
  • Administered Windows Server 2012/2016 environments — Active Directory, Group Policy, DNS, DHCP, and Exchange.
  • Managed user lifecycle — provisioning, access control, and offboarding — using Active Directory across the organization.
  • Documented IT processes reducing ticket resolution time by 30% and contributing to internal knowledge base growth.
